chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2171 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection Nos.3, 6 and 18 2. For order on CMA No.10646/2023 (Exemption) 3. For order on CMA No.10647/2023 (Stay) 4. For hearing of main case 12.9.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. It was last taken up on 12.5.2023, which is over two years ago when a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioners. In the last more than two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, once again, despite lapse of more than two years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. In fact the petitioner has never appeared in this petition since its inception, which shows his complete lack of interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
